projects.title: Sistem Antrian Poli
projects.description: Aplikasi web untuk mengatur antrian pasien dengan integrasi printer thermal dan real-time queue management system.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive queue management system for hospital polyclinics. Features include real-time patient queue tracking, thermal printer integration for queue tickets, and dashboard for staff monitoring. Implemented with responsive design for various devices.

projects.title: API Konversi Gambar ke Base64
projects.description: RESTful API untuk mengkonversi gambar menjadi base64 string dengan validasi dan error handling.
projects.longDescription: Built a lightweight Node.js API that handles image conversion to base64 format. Includes file validation, error handling, and support for multiple image formats. Optimized for performance and scalability.

projects.title: TelkomProperty Responsive Web
projects.description: Frontend project built with Next.js and TailwindCSS for responsive property listing SPA.
projects.longDescription: Created a responsive single-page application for property listings. Implemented with Next.js for server-side rendering and TailwindCSS for modern styling. Responsive across all device sizes with smooth animations.

projects.title: Patient Survey & RSAJ Portal
projects.description: Fullstack portal untuk survey pasien dan manajemen admisi rumah sakit RSAJ.
projects.longDescription: Developed a comprehensive hospital patient portal with survey system and admission management. Features include patient registration, survey forms, appointment scheduling, and admin dashboard for staff management.

projects.title: Doctor Lounge Mobile App
projects.description: Mobile application untuk doctor lounge dengan integrasi backend dan real-time features.
projects.longDescription: Built a cross-platform mobile app using React Native for doctors' workspace. Includes real-time notifications, messaging system, schedule management, and integration with hospital backend systems.
